docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY PLOTKIN, GENE AS TO DEFENDANT COOPER, CHRISTOPHER ELTERMAN, MOSES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (7 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF PLOTKIN, GENE
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-03-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-03-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY ALL PARTIES. SERVICE WAIVED. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO MOSES ELTERMAN BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-03-2010 AT 3:30PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PLOTKIN, GENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COOPER, CHRISTOPHER $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $78.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,578.50, DEFENDANT MOSES ELTERMAN DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-03-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
